title: aster hesperius var. laetevirens
intro: Aster hesperius var. laetevirens, also known as Western Yarrow, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Aster hesperius var. laetevirens include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. This plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects.
